title: Fix remaining 'orchestrator' references in CLI output and onboarding
description:
After the project rename to 'agent-takt', several user-visible strings still say 'orchestrator' instead of 'takt'. Identified from running 'takt init':

1. Header banner: '=== orchestrator init ===' → '=== takt init ==='
2. Final message: 'Run `orchestrator summary` to verify the setup.' → 'Run `takt summary` to verify the setup.'
3. Gitignore message: 'Updated .gitignore with orchestrator entries' → 'Updated .gitignore with takt entries'

Search the full codebase (src/agent_takt/) for any remaining user-visible string literals containing 'orchestrator' and replace them with 'takt'. This includes console output, error messages, log lines, and any help text. Do NOT rename identifiers, class names, variable names, or internal symbols — only user-facing string content.

Files likely involved: src/agent_takt/onboarding.py, src/agent_takt/cli.py. Check all files under src/agent_takt/ for completeness.

Acceptance criteria:
- 'takt init' output contains no references to 'orchestrator'.
- Grep for user-visible string literals containing 'orchestrator' in src/agent_takt/ returns no results (excluding internal identifiers/comments).
- All existing tests pass.
